name: kulabuddy
description: KulaBuddy autonomous AI agent with built-in GGML runtime, multi-model orchestration, automation, and self-learning

scripts.start:ready: npm run build && npm run start:ui
scripts.test: node dist/tests/provider-utils.test.js && node dist/tests/sandbox-policy.test.js && node dist/tests/verifier.test.js && node dist/tests/config-env.test.js && node dist/tests/server-static.test.js && node dist/tests/domain-engine.test.js && node dist/tests/model-profiles.test.js && node dist/tests/approval-policy.test.js && node dist/tests/approval-store.test.js && node dist/tests/tool-registry-approval.test.js && node dist/tests/failure-replay.test.js && node dist/tests/task-intent.test.js && node dist/tests/capability-router.test.js && node dist/tests/skill-create-tool.test.js && node dist/tests/code-agent-tool.test.js && node dist/tests/generative-media-tool.test.js && node dist/tests/social-publish-tool.test.js && node dist/tests/artifact-generator.test.js && node dist/tests/automation-registry.test.js && node dist/tests/task-store.test.js && node dist/tests/task-queue.test.js && node dist/tests/automation-runner.test.js && node dist/tests/agent-runtime.test.js && node dist/tests/plan-parser.test.js && node dist/tests/multi-agent.test.js && node dist/tests/knowledge-base.test.js && node dist/tests/thought-tree.test.js && node dist/tests/search-tool.test.js && node dist/tests/web-fetch-tool.test.js
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run test
